domain: Igbo Uli body painting (Igbo S.E. Nigeria women-led; juice drawn freehand on body, walls; designs fade in ~1 week; ephemeral by design)
specific_mechanism: Time-decaying LoRA adapter: ΔW(0) initialized in null space of base weights (Null-LoRA-style), with explicit exponential decay schedule ΔW(t) = ΔW(0) · 2^{-t/τ} where τ is a per-adapter half-life and t is inference time or query count since adapter activation; after 3τ the adapter has decayed to ~12% magnitude.
llm_application: ULI-EPHEMERAL: ephemeral-by-design null-space LoRA adapter. Each adapter is created with: (a) base-orthogonal initialization in null space of pre-trained weights (Null-LoRA-style); (b) a per-adapter half-life τ in queries or wall-clock; (c) inference-time application of decay schedule ΔW_active(t) = ΔW(0) · exp(-t·ln2/τ). The adapter contributes maximally at t=0 (when 'painted'), reaches 50% at t=τ, and effectively vanishes at t≈3τ. Differs from Null-LoRA 2512.15233 (null-space init, no time decay), OPLoRA 2510.13003 (orthogonal projection, no decay), LUNE 2512.07375 (discrete unlearning via negative examples), CLoRA ACL 2025 (orthogonal subspace regularization, no decay) by combining (a) null-space orthogonality with (b) EXPLICIT EXPONENTIAL TIME-DECAY of adapter magnitude at inference. Differs from R414 KAREN-WEFT-NULL (joint param+activation orthogonal, no decay) by being temporally ephemeral rather than statically orthogonal.
novelty_claim: Null-LoRA + OPLoRA + LUNE + CLoRA cover null-space adapter + unlearning space. ULI-EPHEMERAL adds the (b) EXPLICIT TIME-DECAY half-life schedule on the null-space adapter. Recombination — null-space orthogonality is well-covered, half-life decay schedule is well-covered by checkpoint expiry / staleness literature (e.g., RAG document freshness, cache TTL). Composition is small twist.
